title: Sparkling — Electrician Marketplace Platform (Web App)

requirements.text: Create a full-screen animated splash screen as the app entry point. Display the 'Sparkling' brand logo (lightning bolt icon) centered on a deep charcoal/dark background with an electric yellow accent color. Animate the logo with a fade-in + scale effect, followed by a horizontal electric arc animation, then auto-navigate to the login page after 2.5 seconds. Include the tagline 'Power Your World' below the logo.

quotes: First make a beautiful flash screen

acceptanceCriteria: Splash screen renders on initial app load as a full-viewport overlay
Logo and tagline are centered on a dark background with electric yellow accents
Fade-in and scale animation plays on load
Screen auto-redirects to login page after 2.5 seconds
Animation is smooth and does not cause layout shift

requirements.text: Implement a role-based login page with a role selector dropdown (Super Admin, Electrician Admin, Electrician, Customer, Contractor). Pre-fill default demo credentials automatically when a role is selected. Default credentials: Super Admin — admin@sparkling.com / Admin@123; Electrician Admin — eladmin@sparkling.com / ElecAdmin@123; Electrician — electrician@sparkling.com / Elec@123; Customer — customer@sparkling.com / Customer@123; Contractor — contractor@sparkling.com / Contract@123. Display the pre-filled credentials visibly in the login form fields. Include a 'Login' button that routes to the appropriate dashboard based on role.

quotes: add a by default logins credentials for all login pages

acceptanceCriteria: Login page shows a role selector with all 5 roles
Selecting a role auto-fills the email and password fields with default credentials
Default credentials are visible (not masked by default) so users can review them
Login button routes to the correct role-specific dashboard
Backend validates credentials and returns a role-scoped session token
Invalid credentials show a clear error message

requirements.text: Implement user registration flow for Customer and Contractor roles. Registration must include: full name, phone number, email, password, and a mandatory location selection field. The location dropdown must contain at least 5 predefined service areas (e.g., North District, South District, East Zone, West Zone, Central City). A user cannot complete registration without selecting a location. Store user role, location, and profile data in the backend.

quotes: User registration & login (with mandatory location selection – minimum 5 areas)

acceptanceCriteria: Registration form includes all required fields: name, phone, email, password, location
Location field is a dropdown with at least 5 predefined areas
Form submission is blocked if location is not selected
Registered user data is persisted in the backend with correct role assignment
Successful registration redirects to the appropriate dashboard

requirements.text: Implement electrician registration with a multi-step form: Step 1 — personal details (name, phone, email, password, location); Step 2 — professional details (years of experience, service categories offered); Step 3 — document upload (Aadhar card, PAN card, trade certificates, profile photo). All document uploads must be stored securely. After submission, the electrician account is set to 'Pending Verification' status and is NOT visible to customers until an admin approves it.

quotes: Electrician registration with document verification (Aadhar, PAN, certificates, etc.)
Verification workflow (admin approval required before service visibility)

acceptanceCriteria: Multi-step registration form with 3 distinct steps renders correctly
Document upload fields accept image and PDF files
Submitted electrician profile is saved with status 'pending_verification'
Electrician does not appear in customer search results while status is pending
Electrician receives a confirmation message after submission

requirements.text: Build a Super Admin dashboard with the following sections: Overview metrics (total users, active electricians, pending verifications, revenue today); User management table (list all users with role filters, search, deactivate/activate actions); Electrician verification queue (list pending electricians with document viewer, Approve/Reject buttons, rejection reason input); Revenue & commission tracker (total platform revenue, commission per transaction); Dispute resolution panel (list open disputes with status and resolution actions); Promotional banners management (upload, set active/inactive, assign to location); Notification broadcaster (send push/in-app notifications by role or location).

quotes: Analytics, revenue tracking, dispute resolution, product management

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard is only accessible when logged in as Super Admin role
Overview metric cards display real data from backend
Electrician verification queue shows document previews and approve/reject actions
Approving an electrician changes their status to 'verified' and makes them visible in search
Rejecting requires a reason and notifies the electrician
Revenue tracker shows commission breakdown per transaction
Banner management allows image upload with location targeting

requirements.text: Build an Electrician Admin dashboard with sections: Managed electricians list (with verification status, location, ratings); Pending verification actions (approve/reject with document review); Payment management (view earnings per electrician, commission deducted, payout status); Performance metrics (jobs completed, ratings average, dispute count per electrician).

quotes: Electrician Admin dashboard (manage electricians, payments, verification)

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard only accessible for Electrician Admin role
Lists all electricians under this admin's jurisdiction with filters by status and location
Document verification panel with approve/reject actions
Payment panel shows per-electrician earnings and commission breakdown

requirements.text: Build the customer-facing Electrician Discovery page. Display a search interface with location filter (dropdown of 5+ areas), service category filter, and radius selector. Show results as cards grouped by proximity. Each electrician card must show: name, photo, rating (stars), services offered, location, and a 'Book Now' button. Unverified electricians must never appear in results.
acceptanceCriteria: Discovery page shows only verified electricians
Location and service category filters work correctly
Electricians are grouped and sorted by proximity to selected location
Each card shows all required fields
'Book Now' button navigates to booking flow

requirements.text: Implement a rating and recommendation system. After a completed job, the customer can rate the electrician 1–5 stars and leave a written review. The electrician's average rating is displayed on their profile card. The platform recommends top-rated electricians in the discovery page results (sorted by rating descending as default). Electricians with ratings below 2 stars are flagged for admin review.
acceptanceCriteria: Rating modal appears after job completion for the customer
Average rating is computed and stored per electrician
Discovery results default to sorting by highest rating
Electricians below 2.0 average rating are flagged in the admin dashboard

requirements.text: Build a service categories module. Define the following service categories in the backend: Electrical Repair, Preventive Maintenance, New Installation, Wiring & Rewiring, Panel Upgrade, Emergency Call-out, Industrial Services. Display these categories as visual icon cards on the customer home screen. Selecting a category filters the electrician discovery results.
acceptanceCriteria: Service category cards render on the customer home screen with icons and labels
Clicking a category navigates to the discovery page pre-filtered by that category
Backend stores electrician-to-category mappings

requirements.text: Build a product marketplace section where customers can browse and add electrical products to a cart. Product categories: Switchboards, Wires & Cables, Pliers & Tools, Conduit & Casing, MCBs & Circuit Breakers, Lighting Fixtures. Each product listing shows: image, name, price, stock status, seller/brand name. Include an Add to Cart button and a simple cart summary view. Admin can add/edit/remove products from the Super Admin dashboard.

quotes: Product marketplace (switch boards, wires, pliers, casing, etc.)

acceptanceCriteria: Marketplace page renders product cards with all required fields
Products are filterable by category
Add to Cart works and updates a cart counter in the header
Cart summary page shows items, quantities, and total price
Super Admin can create, edit, and delete products

requirements.text: Implement a government contract module. Display a dedicated 'Government Contracts' section accessible to Contractor and Admin roles. Each contract listing includes: contract title, issuing authority, location, scope of work, budget range, deadline, and an 'Apply' button. Contractors can submit an application with a bid amount and team size. Admins can post, edit, close, and award contracts. Track application status (Submitted, Under Review, Awarded, Rejected) for each contractor.
acceptanceCriteria: Government Contracts section is visible to Contractor and Admin roles only
Contract listings display all required fields
Contractor can apply with bid amount and team size
Application status is tracked and visible to the contractor
Admin can award or reject applications

requirements.text: Implement a promotional banners system on the customer home screen. Display a horizontally scrollable banner carousel at the top of the home page. Banners are uploaded and managed by Super Admin (image, target URL, active status, location targeting). Show only banners targeted at the user's selected location or global banners. Auto-rotate banners every 4 seconds.
acceptanceCriteria: Banner carousel renders at the top of the customer home screen
Banners auto-rotate every 4 seconds
Only active banners matching the user's location (or global) are shown
Super Admin can upload banner images and toggle active/inactive status

requirements.text: Build an in-app notifications system. Display a notification bell icon in the header with an unread badge count. Clicking it opens a notifications panel listing all notifications (timestamp, message, type icon). Notification types: booking confirmation, verification status update, payment received, new contract posted, dispute update, system broadcast. Mark all as read button. Backend must store notifications per user and return unread count.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification bell icon in header shows unread count badge
Notifications panel opens on click and lists all notifications
Notification types are visually distinguished with icons
Mark all as read clears the unread badge
Backend persists notifications per user

requirements.text: Implement a payment management and commission model. Each completed service booking records a transaction: service amount, platform commission (configurable, default 10%), electrician net payout. The customer-facing booking flow includes a payment summary screen showing service fee breakdown. Admin dashboard shows total revenue, commission collected, and pending payouts. Electrician dashboard shows their earnings history and pending balance. Contractor payments for bulk hires are recorded separately with a bulk commission rate (default 8%).
acceptanceCriteria: Each completed booking creates a transaction record with amount, commission, and net payout
Commission rate is configurable by Super Admin (default 10% for individual, 8% for contractor)
Electrician dashboard shows earnings history and pending balance
Admin dashboard shows total revenue and commission breakdown
Payment summary is shown to customer before booking confirmation

requirements.text: Build the Electrician dashboard view (visible when logged in as Electrician role). Sections: Profile status (verification badge, edit profile); My Jobs (upcoming, in-progress, completed bookings); Earnings (current balance, transaction history, commission deducted); My Documents (view uploaded Aadhar, PAN, certificates with status); My Reviews (list of customer ratings and comments); Availability toggle (online/offline status).
acceptanceCriteria: Electrician dashboard is only accessible to Electrician role
Profile section shows verification badge (Pending/Verified/Rejected)
Jobs section lists bookings filtered by status
Earnings section shows balance and transaction history
Availability toggle updates electrician's online status in the backend

requirements.text: Apply a consistent industrial-grade visual design system across all pages. Use a dark charcoal primary background (#1A1A2E), electric yellow accent (#F5C518), clean white text, and a sans-serif font (Inter). Use bold icon-based navigation, card-based layouts with subtle borders, and a lightning bolt motif as the brand symbol. All dashboards must have a left sidebar navigation. Mobile-first responsive layout for all views. No decorative gradients — flat, high-contrast UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette consistently uses #1A1A2E background and #F5C518 accent across all pages
Inter font applied globally
All admin and user dashboards have a left sidebar with role-appropriate navigation items
All views are responsive and usable on mobile screen widths
Lightning bolt icon is used as the brand logo mark throughout

constraints: All Motoko backend logic must remain in a single actor file (backend/main.mo)
Do not edit any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
All generated image assets must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated — do not route them through the backend
Unverified electricians must never appear in customer-facing search or discovery results
Default login credentials must be pre-filled automatically when a role is selected — not hidden or masked
nonGoals: React Native mobile app implementation (this build targets the web app only)
FastAPI or MariaDB backend (this platform uses Motoko on Internet Computer)
Real-time WebSocket chat or in-app calling (not supported by the platform)
Third-party payment gateway integration (payment model is tracked internally)
GPS/geolocation APIs (location is handled via predefined area selection dropdowns)
Email or SMS notification delivery (in-app notifications only)

required: Sparkling app logo — lightning bolt inside a circular dark badge with electric yellow color, flat design (sparkling-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Splash screen full-background dark textured graphic with subtle electric arc lines in yellow on deep charcoal (splash-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Promotional banner placeholder — industrial electrical theme with yellow and dark tones, abstract wiring pattern (banner-placeholder.dim_1200x400.png)

Service category icon set — 7 flat electric yellow icons on dark background: wrench for Repair, gear for Maintenance, lightbulb for Installation, wire coil for Wiring, panel board for Panel Upgrade, warning bolt for Emergency, factory for Industrial (service-icons.dim_512x512.png)
